params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, Winback_Pilot__c, Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId, Amount DESC LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, Winback_Pilot__c, Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') ORDER BY OwnerId, Amount DESC LIMIT 2000
